surface.name: Perplexity API Quickstart, Agent API via cURL (prepaid credits)
surface.selection_basis: The general API Quickstart places Agent API first and recommends it for new projects over Sonar. The same docs surface documents cURL to https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent with Authorization: Bearer $PERPLEXITY_API_KEY, so an SDK install is not required. API Groups & Billing still requires a payment method and prepaid credits before usable keys.

alternatives_considered.name: Python perplexityai SDK Agent example
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Optional client library; the quickstart also documents an equivalent cURL Agent request.

alternatives_considered.name: Search API
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Peer use-case route; Agent API is presented first for web-grounded response generation.

alternatives_considered.name: Sonar API
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: The page says Sonar is in maintenance mode and new projects should prefer Agent API.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Perplexity account and API group, fund prepaid API credits with a payment method, generate a key, and complete an Agent API request over HTTPS.
assumed_prior_state: No Perplexity account, API group, payment method, API credits, key, or request is assumed.
The developer has an email inbox or an Apple or Google identity, a credit card, and a terminal with cURL.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent returns a completed Agent API response with output text.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The Agent API returns a successful JSON body with completed status and assistant output text (citations and usage may also be present).

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Making Your First API Call; quickstart documents cURL to https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent with Bearer $PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The Quickstart names this the first call. cURL is documented for the Agent endpoint, so pip install perplexityai is optional. Prepaid credits and a payment method remain required for usable API keys.

prerequisites.requirement: A Perplexity account created with Apple, Google, or email link or one-time password authentication.
Admin permission for API group billing and API key management.
A credit card and prepaid API credits; API keys are blocked when the credit balance is exhausted.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

primary_path.action: Open the API Quickstart and follow its API Portal path.
primary_path.output: The API Portal account gate opens.
primary_path.success_signal: The developer can choose an account sign-in method.

primary_path.action: Choose email signup and enter the email address.
details: Apple and Google are documented alternatives.
primary_path.output: Perplexity sends a secure login link or one-time password.
primary_path.success_signal: The email authentication message is received.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: If it does not arrive, check spam, allow team@mail.perplexity.ai, verify the entered address and connection, then contact support.

primary_path.action: Open the secure login link or enter the one-time password to authenticate.
primary_path.input: Latest email link or one-time password
primary_path.success_signal: The API Portal can be accessed.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Use the newest link on the same device; official help also recommends Google or Apple if email sign-in fails.

primary_path.action: Create the first API group and choose a descriptive group name.
primary_path.success_signal: Group Settings, Billing, and API keys are available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: No group-creation failure recovery is documented.

primary_path.action: Open Group Settings and complete the organization name, address, and tax details.
primary_path.output: Organization details are stored for invoices.
primary_path.success_signal: The group is configured for billing.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: No validation recovery for these fields is documented.

primary_path.action: Open Billing, select Add payment method, and enter the requested credit-card information in the Stripe-managed flow.
details: Adding the card does not charge it.
primary_path.success_signal: The Billing page shows the payment method and credit balance.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: No card-rejection recovery is documented on the inspected pages.

primary_path.action: Select Buy more credits and purchase enough prepaid API credits for the call.
details: Auto reload is optional and recommended to avoid interruption.
primary_path.success_signal: A positive credit balance is shown.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: If credits run out, API keys are blocked; purchase credits or configure auto top-up.

primary_path.action: Open API keys and select + Generate API Key.
primary_path.output: The full API key is displayed once.
primary_path.success_signal: A new key is visible for copying.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Key generation troubleshooting says to check account status and API tier limits.

primary_path.action: Copy the key immediately and store it securely before leaving the page.
primary_path.output: The developer has the credential needed for HTTPS requests.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The full key cannot be retrieved later.

primary_path.output: The shell can authenticate HTTP requests.
primary_path.success_signal: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY is set for the current shell.

primary_path.action: POST an Agent API request with cURL to https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent.
details: Include Authorization: Bearer $PERPLEXITY_API_KEY and Content-Type: application/json.
Send a JSON body with model and input as shown in the quickstart cURL Agent example.
primary_path.input: Funded API key and Agent request body
primary_path.success_signal: The response is completed and contains assistant output text.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: A 401 can mean an invalid or deleted key or exhausted credits; a 429 requires backoff and may require a higher tier.

primary_path.action: Confirm the Agent API JSON includes completed assistant output text.
primary_path.success_signal: Assistant output text is present in the successful response.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: An error body means the first call did not succeed.

branches.path: Authenticate with the selected identity provider instead of the email link or one-time password route.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Only the account authentication steps change; the route converges at API group creation.

branches.path: Obtain an invitation from an Admin instead of creating a new independent group.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Group creation and possibly billing administration are performed by the existing team's Admin.

branches.path: Set auto reload preferences so credits are added when the balance drops below the configured threshold.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds a recurring payment preference but does not change the first request.

branches.condition: The developer prefers the Python or TypeScript SDK instead of cURL.
branches.path: Install the official SDK and run the published Agent example with the same PERPLEXITY_API_KEY and prepaid credits.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds optional local package installation without changing the authenticated Agent API boundary.

friction_gates.description: Email signup depends on receiving and using a login link or one-time password.
API group setup requires organization name, address, and tax details.
The official API group prerequisites require a credit card for payment setup.
Credits are purchased in advance, and the public docs do not state a minimum purchase amount for this first call.
The generated key is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

time_to_first_success.value: The Quickstart says to generate an API key and make the first call in under three minutes; this is not an independently measured duration.

sources.title: API Groups & Billing
sections_used: Creating and Managing an API Group

sections_used: Getting Started: Create Your API Group First

Add our email address to your safe senders list

sources.title: I am having issues signing in

uncertainties.question: What minimum credit purchase amount does the live Billing console permit?
uncertainties.impact: The mandatory initial cash outlay cannot be stated, so the cost gate changes a required action and keeps the record at needs-human-judgment.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Official docs require prepaid credits and identify Buy more credits but publish no minimum amount.

uncertainties.question: What exact Stripe card fields and verification screens appear?
uncertainties.impact: The atomic screen count inside the required payment step cannot be recorded.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Official docs state that Stripe manages the card flow but do not enumerate its current fields or challenges.
